errors.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters

welcome.councilSubtitle_other: <accent>{{count}} models</accent> will propose, debate and vote to converge on a single answer.
welcome.singleSubtitle: One prompt, several models, one answer. Turn on the <accent>Council</accent> so the models deliberate and converge.

settings.title: Settings

empty.title: No providers connected
empty.body: Connect at least one provider to start chatting. Connected providers take part in Council mode.

council.membersDesc: Several models propose, debate and vote to converge on a single answer.
council.autoSelection: <accent>Automatic selection</accent> — the Council picks one strong and one light model per connected provider.
council.needTwo: Connect at least 2 providers to configure the Council.

disconnect.title: Disconnect provider
